name: bago-platform
description: Bago - Peer-to-peer international package delivery platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:webapp && npm run install:admin && npm run install:mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,WEBAPP,ADMIN" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:webapp" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "BACKEND,WEBAPP,ADMIN,MOBILE" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:webapp" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:webapp && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend does not require build step'
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:webapp && npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:mobile
scripts.clean:webapp: cd BAGO_WEBAPP && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json dist
scripts.clean:admin: cd ADMIN_NEW && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint:webapp && npm run lint:admin
scripts.lint:webapp: cd BAGO_WEBAPP && npm run lint || echo 'No lint script'

author: Bago Team
